properties.displayName: CMD Launched From Suspicious Parent Process
properties.description: Detects when cmd.exe is launched from a suspicious or uncommon parent process (e.g., Office apps, browsers, or script hosts), which can indicate malicious code execution.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (ParentImage|endswith has "\winword.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\excel.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\outlook.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\wscript.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\cscript.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\mshta.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\iexplore.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\chrome.exe" or ParentImage|endswith has "\firefox.exe")
